name: video-tools
description: Local, free, transcript-driven video editing + auto-Shorts. Edit your video by deleting words; auto-clean dead air; generate captioned vertical clips. Runs on ffmpeg + Whisper — no subscription.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=api && npm run typecheck --workspace=web

_comment_devDependencies: drizzle-kit does not depend on drizzle-orm — it resolves it from the consumer's tree. drizzle-orm's 28 optional peers make npm nest it under api/, out of the hoisted drizzle-kit's reach ('Please install latest version of drizzle-orm'). Declaring both here hoists a single shared copy. Keep these ranges in sync with api/package.json.
